test.observation: All 214 unit tests passed across hypervisor, sandbox, and shared_types packages. Test warnings present but non-blocking (dead_code, unused_variables in test files).

lint.observation: Clippy passed with no warnings, confirming the baseline blocker fix from milestone 1 is stable.

nonBlockingIssues.description: docs/adr-0026-implementation.md line 69: Changed a specific file reference from 'docs/state-report-2026-03-15-cagent-docs-landscape-audit.md' to the more generic '2026-03-15 docs landscape audit state report'. While the file still exists and the reference is understandable, the less specific reference could make it slightly harder to locate the exact file. This is a minor stylistic choice and does not affect functionality.

synthesis.overallAssessment: The docs-finalize milestone is complete and fully validated. Both implementation features passed code review with no blocking issues. All validators (test, typecheck, lint) passed cleanly. The cogent cutover documentation is comprehensive, consistent, and verified across root entrypoints, active ADRs, operator runbooks, and generated ATLAS content.

featuresReviewed.summary: Successfully updated all active operator-facing documentation to use cogent terminology. Root docs (README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md), dispatch docs (ADR-0026), and operator runbooks all reflect the cogent cutover. All stale-reference checks passed. One non-blocking stylistic observation noted regarding a file reference change.

Successfully ran the final cutover acceptance suite. ATLAS regenerated cleanly (88 docs scanned). All cargo validators (check, test, clippy), Nix validation, Linux package derivation, bootstrap dry run, runtime commands, and stale-reference sweeps passed. The mission is fully green and acceptance-ready.

synthesis.milestoneReadiness: The docs-finalize milestone has achieved all expected behaviors. The documentation surface is clean of stale references, consistently describes the cogent work-graph contract, and has been verified through comprehensive validation. No blocking issues or shared state gaps were identified. The milestone is ready for user testing validation.
